title: Fixing a React Memoized Component Re-renders Due to Changing Object Properties

statement.markdown: You are given a React functional component that uses the `useMemo` hook to memoize its state. However, the component is re-rendering unnecessarily when an object property changes. Your task is to fix the bug by modifying the `useMemo` dependency array to prevent re-renders when the object properties do not change.
statement.inputFormat: The input is an object with two properties: `person` and `address`.
statement.outputFormat: The output is the memoized result of the `useMemo` hook.
statement.notes: The `person` object has two properties: `name` and `age`. The `address` object has two properties: `street` and `city`. The component should only re-render when the `person` object changes.

constraints.description: The number of times to update the `person` and `address` objects.

examples.output: The memoized result of the `useMemo` hook.
examples.explanation: The component should only re-render when the `person` object changes.

hints.text: The `useMemo` hook is not correctly memoizing the state.

editorial.title: Editorial for Fixing a React Memoized Component Re-renders Due to Changing Object Properties
editorial.intuition: The `useMemo` hook should only re-render when the `person` object changes.
editorial.bruteForce: The brute force approach would be to re-render the component every time the state changes.
editorial.betterSolution: A better solution would be to modify the `useMemo` dependency array to prevent re-renders when the object properties do not change.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution would be to use the `JSON.stringify` method to compare the `person` object before and after updating it.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The proof of correctness would be to show that the `useMemo` hook only re-renders when the `person` object changes.
editorial.dryRun: A dry run would involve updating the `person` object and checking if the component re-renders.
commonMistakes: Not preventing re-renders when object properties do not change
